# Docs

- [☁️ filo studios.](/docs): Welcome to filo studios.
- filo_vehiclekeys
  - [filo_vehiclekeys](/docs/filo_vehiclekeys): A fully refactored vehicle key management and locksmith system for FiveM.
  - [Compatibility](/docs/filo_vehiclekeys/compatibility): Drop-in support for qb-vehiclekeys, and qbx_vehiclekeys.
  - [Configuration](/docs/filo_vehiclekeys/configuration): Full breakdown of every config option available in filo_vehiclekeys.
  - [Exports](/docs/filo_vehiclekeys/exports): Client and server exports provided by filo_vehiclekeys for use in other resources.
  - [Flows](/docs/filo_vehiclekeys/flows): How mechanical key cutting, OBD fob programming, and the NPC locksmith store work.
  - [Installation](/docs/filo_vehiclekeys/installation): Dependencies, setup steps, and migration from the legacy BIN format.
